title: On Running Jumps After Raising Outlook for Revenue and Gross Margins
text: On Running shares jumped following Q2 2024 earnings when the company raised its outlook for full-year revenue and gross margins. Management guided for at least 30% constant currency growth and maintained gross margin guidance of approximately 60%. The updated outlook reflected confidence in sustained momentum from strong DTC growth and successful brand partnerships. The Zendaya partnership announcement around the same time provided additional support for investor sentiment. Strong Asia-Pacific growth of 73.7% and successful apparel expansion with 63% growth demonstrated On's ability to diversify revenue streams and improve profitability. The market rewarded the combination of strong execution and confident guidance.
